products.name: Contura Style
products.tagline: Contoured curves with a modern grip — compact and elegant.
products.description: Contoured curves with a modern stay-cool grip — compact, elegant, and engineered with HP's full TriLock™ safety system. Forged from premium aluminium for even, efficient heat.

products.name: Standard Series
products.tagline: The classic profile — even heat, dependable everyday cooking.
products.description: The classic straight-wall profile — dependable everyday cooking with even heat distribution and HP's signature locking and safety system. Premium aluminium build.

products.name: Matka Style
products.tagline: The rounded handi silhouette — generous belly, traditional form.
products.description: The rounded handi silhouette — a generous belly and traditional form, finished with HP's TriLock™ lid and SafeValve™ release. Premium aluminium build.

why.title: Experienced Workforce
why.desc: Skilled craftsmen who have refined the cooker over 17 years of production.

why.title: Robust Infrastructure
why.desc: A well-equipped facility built for consistent, repeatable quality.

why.title: R&D Department
why.desc: In-house design and testing keeps the product improving year on year.

why.title: Large Production Capacity
why.desc: Volume output that comfortably absorbs wholesale and bulk orders.

why.title: Competitive Pricing
why.desc: Direct-from-manufacturer rates that work for resellers and distributors.

why.title: Bulk Order Capability
why.desc: Set up to take, schedule and dispatch large orders across India.

safety.name: HP SafeValve™
safety.desc: Precision pressure release regulates steam through every cook cycle.

safety.name: HP TriLock™ Lid
safety.desc: Triple-point locking holds the lid secure until pressure is safely released.

safety.name: HP SafeSeal™ Gasket
safety.desc: Precision-fit rubber gasket maintains an even, reliable seal.

safety.name: HP DuraCook™ Body
safety.desc: ISI-standard aluminium construction built to take the heat, year after year.
